sizing_rule.note: Position size scaled inversely to 20-day sample variance (calculated as Σ(deviation²)/19). Higher variance = smaller position; lower variance = larger position. Variance used as volatility input for optimal f determination.

source_rule_text: Calculate sample variance over a 20-day period by squaring the differences from mean, summing positive values, and dividing by 19 to determine volatility for position sizing.
